visuals.title: Hdfs
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">HDFS (Hadoop Distributed File System)</text>

  <!-- NameNode -->
  <rect x="160" y="70" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    NameNode
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- DataNodes -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    DataNode 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="170" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    DataNode 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="290" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    DataNode 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Blocks -->
  <rect x="60" y="240" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="100" y="240" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="180" y="240" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="220" y="240" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="300" y="240" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="340" y="240" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Arrows -->
  <path d="M210,130 L210,180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M210,180 L90,180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M210,180 L210,180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M210,180 L330,180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="210" y="310" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Distributed Data Blocks (Replicated across nodes)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
